title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Syntel India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Syntel India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Syntel India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Hyderabad-based team.

About Syntel India:
Syntel India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Syntel India!
